steps.title: Identify the function of the phrase starting with 'among them'
steps.content: The phrase “among them Nigerian American essayist and novelist Teju Cole” is meant to clarify which of the “leading contemporary writers” are being referenced—it specifies the group by providing a particular example.

steps.title: Apply the comma rule for clarifying phrases
steps.content: A comma introduces or sets off a clarifying phrase that identifies or specifies a noun. D correctly uses a comma: “writers, among them Nigerian American essayist and novelist Teju Cole.” The others violate this—A creates a sentence fragment with a period, B omits punctuation, and C uses a semicolon for a non-independent clause. That matches choice D — D is correct.
